{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior HR Executive",
  "description": "Elevare Human Solutions Limited is a leading Human Resource and recruitment solutions company committed to connecting top-tier talent with employers across Nigeria and internationally. We specialize in providing comprehensive HR consulting, talent acquisition, and workforce management services for diverse industries. Our mission is to deliver tailored recruitment solutions that support organizational growth while fostering career opportunities for skilled professionals. At Elevare, we leverage industry expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a robust network to ensure seamless hiring processes and exceptional candidate experiences. Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating impactful partnerships that drive success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior HR Executive

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly strategic, results-driven, and experienced Senior HR Executive to lead and strengthen our human capital operations within the Oil &amp; Gas sector.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong operational HR expertise combined with strategic workforce management capabilities to support business growth, organizational effectiveness, compliance, and employee performance across multiple functions.
	This role requires a proactive HR professional with proven experience in workforce planning, organizational development, employee relations, policy governance, and performance optimization within a fast-paced engineering or Oil &amp; Gas environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage end-to-end HR operations, administration, and workforce governance across the organization.
	Develop and execute strategic recruitment, talent acquisition, onboarding, and manpower planning initiatives aligned with business objectives.
	Partner closely with management and department heads to drive workforce optimization, succession planning, and organizational effectiveness.
	Oversee employee relations matters including disciplinary procedures, grievance management, conflict resolution, and employee engagement initiatives in line with Nigerian Labour Law and company policies.
	Drive the implementation, review, and enforcement of HR policies, SOPs, compliance frameworks, and operational standards.
	Coordinate and manage the company&rsquo;s performance management system including KPIs, appraisals, probation reviews, performance improvement plans, and staff development initiatives.
	Support compensation administration, payroll coordination, leave management, and accurate employee records documentation.
	Ensure full compliance with statutory labor regulations, internal governance policies, and industry best practices.
	Provide strategic HR insights through workforce analytics, HR metrics, management reports, and data-driven recommendations to support executive decision-making.
	Support leadership in fostering a high-performance culture focused on accountability, discipline, operational excellence, and continuous improvement.
	Drive learning and development initiatives to strengthen employee capability, retention, and overall organizational productivity.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, or a related discipline.
	8&ndash;10 years of progressive HR experience, preferably within the Oil &amp; Gas, Engineering, EPC, or technical services industry.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian Labour Law, employee relations, workforce governance, and HR compliance practices.
	Demonstrated experience managing both strategic and operational HR functions in a structured organization.
	Proven ability to work with senior leadership and manage cross-functional stakeholder relationships effectively.
	Strong leadership, problem-solving, communication, and conflict management skills.
	High level of professionalism, confidentiality, and decision-making capability.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and HR management systems.
	CIPM, SHRM, or HRCI certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitmentlc93@gmail.com using &ldquo;Senior HR Executive&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-18",

Senior HR Executive Job at Elevare Human Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Elevare Human Solutions Limited is a leading Human Resource and recruitment solutions company committed to connecting top-tier talent with employers across Nigeria and internationally. We specialize in providing comprehensive HR consulting, talent acquisition, and workforce management services for diverse industries. Our mission is to deliver tailored recruitment solutions that support organizational growth while fostering career opportunities for skilled professionals. At Elevare, we leverage industry expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a robust network to ensure seamless hiring processes and exceptional candidate experiences. Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating impactful partnerships that drive success.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior HR Executive

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly strategic, results-driven, and experienced Senior HR Executive to lead and strengthen our human capital operations within the Oil & Gas sector.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong operational HR expertise combined with strategic workforce management capabilities to support business growth, organizational effectiveness, compliance, and employee performance across multiple functions.
	This role requires a proactive HR professional with proven experience in workforce planning, organizational development, employee relations, policy governance, and performance optimization within a fast-paced engineering or Oil & Gas environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage end-to-end HR operations, administration, and workforce governance across the organization.
	Develop and execute strategic recruitment, talent acquisition, onboarding, and manpower planning initiatives aligned with business objectives.
	Partner closely with management and department heads to drive workforce optimization, succession planning, and organizational effectiveness.
	Oversee employee relations matters including disciplinary procedures, grievance management, conflict resolution, and employee engagement initiatives in line with Nigerian Labour Law and company policies.
	Drive the implementation, review, and enforcement of HR policies, SOPs, compliance frameworks, and operational standards.
	Coordinate and manage the company’s performance management system including KPIs, appraisals, probation reviews, performance improvement plans, and staff development initiatives.
	Support compensation administration, payroll coordination, leave management, and accurate employee records documentation.
	Ensure full compliance with statutory labor regulations, internal governance policies, and industry best practices.
	Provide strategic HR insights through workforce analytics, HR metrics, management reports, and data-driven recommendations to support executive decision-making.
	Support leadership in fostering a high-performance culture focused on accountability, discipline, operational excellence, and continuous improvement.
	Drive learning and development initiatives to strengthen employee capability, retention, and overall organizational productivity.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, or a related discipline.
	8–10 years of progressive HR experience, preferably within the Oil & Gas, Engineering, EPC, or technical services industry.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian Labour Law, employee relations, workforce governance, and HR compliance practices.
	Demonstrated experience managing both strategic and operational HR functions in a structured organization.
	Proven ability to work with senior leadership and manage cross-functional stakeholder relationships effectively.
	Strong leadership, problem-solving, communication, and conflict management skills.
	High level of professionalism, confidentiality, and decision-making capability.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and HR management systems.
	CIPM, SHRM, or HRCI certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Senior HR Executive” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Myafrimall Logistics Limited is seeking a smart, dedicated, and customer-focused individual to join our team as a Remote Customer Service Representative. The role primarily involves supporting our customer service operations across the United States and Canada time zones, while also attending to other international and local customer engagements.

Although this is a remote position, the staff may occasionally be required to resume physically at the office when the need arises.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Ogba / Berger, Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday - Saturday
Work Mode: Remote (Hybrid &ndash; occasional onsite work when required)
Work Hours: 3:00 PM &ndash; 11:00 PM or 4:00 PM &ndash; 12:00 AM (varies based on time zone)
Resumption: Immediate

Key Responsibilities


	Attend to customer enquiries via calls, WhatsApp, email, and other digital platforms.
	Provide accurate information about shipping rates, timelines, and company services.
	Support customer engagement and follow-ups across the U.S. and Canada operations.
	Resolve customer complaints professionally and ensure quick resolution.
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions and transactions.
	Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth service delivery.


Requirements


	1&ndash;3 years of experience in customer service or a similar role.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and stay productive remotely.
	Strong problem-solving and multitasking skills.
	Proficiency in WhatsApp Business, email, and basic Microsoft Office tools.
	A stable internet connection and a conducive work environment at home.
	Must be available to work evening hours and Saturdays.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@myafrimall.com using &ldquo;Remote CSR Application&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Important Note


	The interview will be physical and will take place at our office in Ogba, Lagos.
	Applicants residing outside Lagos should kindly take note before applying.

Customer Service Representative Job at Myafrimall Logistics Limited




        
    

        
        Myafrimall Logistics Limited is seeking a smart, dedicated, and customer-focused individual to join our team as a Remote Customer Service Representative. The role primarily involves supporting our customer service operations across the United States and Canada time zones, while also attending to other international and local customer engagements.

Although this is a remote position, the staff may occasionally be required to resume physically at the office when the need arises.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ogba / Berger, Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday - Saturday
Work Mode: Remote (Hybrid – occasional onsite work when required)
Work Hours: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM or 4:00 PM – 12:00 AM (varies based on time zone)
Resumption: Immediate

Key Responsibilities


	Attend to customer enquiries via calls, WhatsApp, email, and other digital platforms.
	Provide accurate information about shipping rates, timelines, and company services.
	Support customer engagement and follow-ups across the U.S. and Canada operations.
	Resolve customer complaints professionally and ensure quick resolution.
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions and transactions.
	Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth service delivery.


Requirements


	1–3 years of experience in customer service or a similar role.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and stay productive remotely.
	Strong problem-solving and multitasking skills.
	Proficiency in WhatsApp Business, email, and basic Microsoft Office tools.
	A stable internet connection and a conducive work environment at home.
	Must be available to work evening hours and Saturdays.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Remote CSR Application” as the subject of the email.

Important Note


	The interview will be physical and will take place at our office in Ogba, Lagos.
	Applicants residing outside Lagos should kindly take note before applying.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Content Creator",
  "description": "Onyx Beauty Hub is a luxury hair brand that offer wholesale and retail of virgin hair and raw single donor hairs . We offer variety of hair textures, including straight, wavy and curly hairs. Our hairs are carefully sourced and selected from various donors in China,Vietnam,Laos, Cambodia, Philippines, India,Burma,Argentina

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Creator&nbsp;

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

&nbsp;

About the Role


	The ideal candidate must possess exceptional video production and editing skills, understand luxury brand storytelling, have a strong eye for aesthetics, and be able to conceptualize, script, create, edit, and publish engaging content across multiple social media platforms.
	This role is for someone who lives and breathes content creation, understands social media trends, and knows how to turn products, customer experiences, and brand stories into highly engaging content that drives visibility, engagement, and sales.


Key Responsibilities
Content Strategy &amp; Planning:


	Develop creative content ideas aligned with the brand&#39;s marketing objectives.
	Create and maintain monthly content calendars.
	Research and identify emerging social media trends, sounds, formats, and opportunities.
	Generate fresh and innovative content concepts that elevate brand positioning.
	Ensure all content aligns with ONYX&#39;s luxury brand identity and voice.


Content Creation &amp; Production:


	
	Conceptualize, script, shoot, and edit high-quality video content.
	


Produce luxury-standard content for:


	Instagram
	TikTok
	Facebook
	YouTube
	WhatsApp Business
	Emerging social platforms


Create engaging:


	Product showcases
	Customer testimonials
	Hair transformation videos
	Behind-the-scenes content
	Educational content
	Lifestyle and luxury storytelling content
	Brand campaigns
	Promotional videos
	Capture high-quality photos and videos of products, clients, and team activities.


Video Editing &amp; Post-Production:


	Edit videos to premium luxury standards.
	Create compelling short-form and long-form video content.
	Add motion graphics, transitions, captions, effects, and sound design where appropriate.
	Optimize content for platform-specific performance.
	Ensure consistency in branding, aesthetics, and storytelling.


Script Writing &amp; Storytelling:


	Write engaging content scripts, hooks, captions, and content briefs.
	Develop storytelling-driven content that connects emotionally with the audience.
	Create content that educates, inspires, entertains, and converts.


Social Media Management Support:


	Work closely with the Social Media Manager and Marketing Team.
	Recommend content strategies based on performance insights.
	Monitor content performance and suggest improvements.
	Stay updated on social media algorithm changes and platform best practices.


Brand Representation:


	Ensure all content reflects the premium positioning of the ONYX brand.
	Maintain exceptional visual standards in all published content.
	Contribute innovative ideas that strengthen brand awareness and customer engagement.


Required Skills and Competencies
Technical Skills:


	
	Advanced video shooting and editing skills.
	


Strong proficiency in:


	CapCut
	Adobe Premiere Pro
	Adobe After Effects
	Canva Pro
	Photoshop (Added Advantage)
	Strong understanding of lighting, composition, framing, and visual storytelling.
	Ability to create content optimized for different social media platforms.


Creative Skills:


	Exceptional creativity and originality.
	Strong storytelling ability.
	Ability to identify trends early and adapt them to luxury branding.
	Excellent script-writing skills.
	Strong visual aesthetic and attention to detail.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly creative and proactive.
	Results-oriented and self-motivated.
	Passionate about beauty, luxury, fashion, and lifestyle content.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Strong communication and collaboration skills.
	Professional appearance and conduct.


What Success Looks Like
Within the first 90 days, the successful candidate should:


	Consistently produce luxury-standard content.
	Demonstrate strong creative direction and storytelling ability.
	Increase audience engagement across platforms.
	Contribute to stronger brand visibility and customer attraction.
	Become a key driver of ONYX&#39;s digital presence and content excellence.


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Updated CV, Portfolio or links to previous content work, to: hronyxhairbynelly@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates with strong content portfolios and proven video editing capabilities will be considered.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-05",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-27",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Onyx Beauty Hub"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "200015"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Social Media Content Creator Job at Onyx Beauty Hub




        
    

        
        Onyx Beauty Hub is a luxury hair brand that offer wholesale and retail of virgin hair and raw single donor hairs . We offer variety of hair textures, including straight, wavy and curly hairs. Our hairs are carefully sourced and selected from various donors in China,Vietnam,Laos, Cambodia, Philippines, India,Burma,Argentina

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Creator 

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

 

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The ideal candidate must possess exceptional video production and editing skills, understand luxury brand storytelling, have a strong eye for aesthetics, and be able to conceptualize, script, create, edit, and publish engaging content across multiple social media platforms.
	This role is for someone who lives and breathes content creation, understands social media trends, and knows how to turn products, customer experiences, and brand stories into highly engaging content that drives visibility, engagement, and sales.


Key Responsibilities
Content Strategy & Planning:


	Develop creative content ideas aligned with the brand's marketing objectives.
	Create and maintain monthly content calendars.
	Research and identify emerging social media trends, sounds, formats, and opportunities.
	Generate fresh and innovative content concepts that elevate brand positioning.
	Ensure all content aligns with ONYX's luxury brand identity and voice.


Content Creation & Production:


	
	Conceptualize, script, shoot, and edit high-quality video content.
	


Produce luxury-standard content for:


	Instagram
	TikTok
	Facebook
	YouTube
	WhatsApp Business
	Emerging social platforms


Create engaging:


	Product showcases
	Customer testimonials
	Hair transformation videos
	Behind-the-scenes content
	Educational content
	Lifestyle and luxury storytelling content
	Brand campaigns
	Promotional videos
	Capture high-quality photos and videos of products, clients, and team activities.


Video Editing & Post-Production:


	Edit videos to premium luxury standards.
	Create compelling short-form and long-form video content.
	Add motion graphics, transitions, captions, effects, and sound design where appropriate.
	Optimize content for platform-specific performance.
	Ensure consistency in branding, aesthetics, and storytelling.


Script Writing & Storytelling:


	Write engaging content scripts, hooks, captions, and content briefs.
	Develop storytelling-driven content that connects emotionally with the audience.
	Create content that educates, inspires, entertains, and converts.


Social Media Management Support:


	Work closely with the Social Media Manager and Marketing Team.
	Recommend content strategies based on performance insights.
	Monitor content performance and suggest improvements.
	Stay updated on social media algorithm changes and platform best practices.


Brand Representation:


	Ensure all content reflects the premium positioning of the ONYX brand.
	Maintain exceptional visual standards in all published content.
	Contribute innovative ideas that strengthen brand awareness and customer engagement.


Required Skills and Competencies
Technical Skills:


	
	Advanced video shooting and editing skills.
	


Strong proficiency in:


	CapCut
	Adobe Premiere Pro
	Adobe After Effects
	Canva Pro
	Photoshop (Added Advantage)
	Strong understanding of lighting, composition, framing, and visual storytelling.
	Ability to create content optimized for different social media platforms.


Creative Skills:


	Exceptional creativity and originality.
	Strong storytelling ability.
	Ability to identify trends early and adapt them to luxury branding.
	Excellent script-writing skills.
	Strong visual aesthetic and attention to detail.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly creative and proactive.
	Results-oriented and self-motivated.
	Passionate about beauty, luxury, fashion, and lifestyle content.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Strong communication and collaboration skills.
	Professional appearance and conduct.


What Success Looks Like
Within the first 90 days, the successful candidate should:


	Consistently produce luxury-standard content.
	Demonstrate strong creative direction and storytelling ability.
	Increase audience engagement across platforms.
	Contribute to stronger brand visibility and customer attraction.
	Become a key driver of ONYX's digital presence and content excellence.


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Updated CV, Portfolio or links to previous content work, to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates with strong content portfolios and proven video editing capabilities will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketplace & Vendor Success Executive Job at Managing Banex Mall Limited




        
    

        
        Managing Banex Mall Limited is a property and facility management company responsible for the administration, operation, and maintenance of Banex Mall. The company oversees the day-to-day management of the mall, ensuring a safe, clean, and conducive environment for businesses, customers, and visitors.

Its core functions include facility management, tenant relations, commercial and leasing, sales, security coordination, maintenance of common areas, revenue administration, compliance monitoring, customer service, and the overall enhancement of the mall's commercial operations. The company is committed to maintaining high operational standards, maximizing tenant satisfaction, and supporting a thriving business environment within the mall.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketplace & Vendor Success Executive

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Responsible for vendor acquisition, marketplace growth, product listings, order generation, and vendor relationship management.


Key Responsibilities


	Recruit vendors onto the marketplace
	Upload and manage product listings
	Maintain vendor relationships
	Generate marketplace orders
	Coordinate deliveries and logistics
	Resolve vendor concerns


Requirements


	OND, HND, or BSc
	Experience in E-commerce, Customer Service, Sales, or Vendor Management
	Good communication skills
	Computer literacy
	Strong organizational skills
	Ability to manage multiple vendors


KPI


	Number of vendors onboarded
	Orders generated
	Vendor retention rate.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
